tasks.subject: Task 1: RetrievalDocument embedding_vector field
tasks.description: Add embedding_vector JSONField to RetrievalDocument plus additive migration. See plan Task 1.

tasks.subject: Task 2: Embeddings provider adapter
tasks.description: EmbeddingCallInput/Result, generated_embedding (char 3-gram hashing), FakeProviderGateway.embed. See plan Task 2.

tasks.subject: Task 3: IndexMemoryVersion embedding lifecycle
tasks.description: IndexMemoryVersion embeds document; graceful skip on missing policy / disabled secret. See plan Task 3.

tasks.subject: Task 4: BuildContextBundle semantic fallback
tasks.description: Cosine similarity helper, query embedding, semantic fallback band, dynamic retrieval_strategy. See plan Task 4.

tasks.subject: Task 5: Golden path embeddings policy
tasks.description: engram_bootstrap_golden_path adds project-scoped embeddings policy bound to golden secret. See plan Task 5.

tasks.subject: Task 6: Evidence and verification
tasks.description: Full backend gate, migration freshness, E2E golden path, repository checks, verification matrix, security review. See plan Task 6.
